summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five independent open PRs. Four non-security PRs lack complete merge preflight proof because the artifact has no Codex /review result and no hydrated review-bot/comment evidence; no merge, close, label, comment, or fix PR action is recommended for those from this run. #91346 is routed to central security handling as the exact security-sensitive PR identified by validation.

Validator identifies #91346 as security-sensitive, and the PR body is tied to no-auth gateway exposure warning behavior; route this exact PR to central OpenClaw security handling without mutating GitHub.
